hypothesis: Combining EMA crossovers with Bollinger Band expansion and volume confirmation creates a robust momentum signal that filters out weak trends while capturing strong directional moves. The EMA crossover identifies the trend direction, Bollinger Band expansion confirms the strength of the move, and volume oscillator ensures the momentum is supported by increased trading activity.
